StaffId.description: The ID of the requested staff member.

TimeIn.description: The time that the staff member started the job task.

TimeOut.description: The time that the staff member stopped doing the job task.

Hours.description: The number of hours on this time card, rounded to the nearest fourth decimal place.

HourlyRate.description: The hourly rate the business pays this staff for this `Task`.

Earnings.description: The total amount earned by the staff member for this time card entry.
